rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF GIOVANNI ALEXANDER HERNANDEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/10/19. Attorney declaration re: fees should state how much time was charged: on each petition and each filing that took significant time (over ~1 hour) and the reasons; client communications; court appearances and their necessity. Attorney has not addressed how much will be charged for the filing of the latest amended petition and has not addressed the excessive costs incurred. Filed stamped courtesy copy of additional filed documents to be provided to Room 202 at least 1 week prior to hearing. Appearance will be required on the continued hearing date, regardless.
